# Factors with Interactions {#factor-interactions}

```{r factor-interactions-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/factor-interactions-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/factor-interactions/"
)
```

```{r child-factor-interactions, child="../lecture-content/24-factor-interactions.Rmd"}
```
